creator: rjs@fdy2.demon.co.uk
text:
The machine description for ARM is missing from
	/usr/include/sys/elf_common.h

Fix: 

RCS file: /u5/cvsroot/FreeBSD/src/sys/sys/elf_common.h,v
retrieving revision 1.4
diff -r1.4 elf_common.h
111a112
> #define EM_ARM                40      /* ARM */
